name: Gnarly Barkley
description: Gnarly Barkley is the blue counterpart of the Life Mini, Barkley, in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: Gnarly Barkley is the blue counterpart of the Life Mini, Barkley, in Skylanders: Trap Team.
personality: Gnarly Barkley is feisty and determined, embodying the strength of the forest in a miniature but powerful form.

story.content: Gnarly Barkley is the blue counterpart of the Life Mini, Barkley, in Skylanders: Trap Team.

trivia: He, Power Punch Pet-Vac, and Eggsellent Weeruptor are the only Minis to be available in single packs instead of double packs.
He bears the same name and color scheme as the counter part of Tree Rex, Gnarly Tree Rex.
This makes him the only Mini variant to be based of a variant for his regular sized counterpart.
His name bears a resemblance to Gnarls Barkley, a 2000's group notable for their song 'Crazy.'
He is the only variant Skylander before SuperChargers to not have an appearance in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
If Gnarly Barkley is placed on the portal in Skylanders: Giants, he shows as a 'special' variant (In Skylanders Swap Force he shows as the regular version).
He is the only variant of a mini Skylander who debuted in another game other than Trap Team.
gameplay: Gnarly Barkley plays identically to Tree Rex and Barkley, utilizing heavy physical attacks like the Shockwave Slam and charging maneuvers like the Sequoia Stampede to dominate the battlefield.

basic.name: Shockwave Slam
basic.content: A powerful ground-shaking slam that creates shockwaves to damage surrounding enemies.

basic.name: Sequoia Stampede
basic.content: A charging stampede attack that tramples anything in its path.
